name: NashBored
short_description: NashBored is a surreal RPG in a dark and unique world.Nash just wont wake up. The dream goes deeper and deeper.What lies beyond the veil of your conscious thought? Who are you, really? Discover the truth of your dream reality.
detailed_description:
-ENTER INTO NASHBORED-

You never know what lies in your mind. The complexities of life become laid bare as information and memories, lost in the slurry of day soup that surrounds your consciousness.

In that chaos, many things can hide and take shape.

Caught in a spiral and displayed on a sadistic gameshow for higher beings,
Nash will be thrust into the depths of her own mind.
Help her to navigate the strange pathways, and try to get out alive.

-The Upper Dreamscape is a dangerous place-

  • Explore through strange memories, meet weird entities!

  • Fight psycho enemies who want you dead!

  • Discover strange prerendered realms!

  • Struggle to survive!
